title: If Function
excerpt:
Hi Guys, I have a formula IF(Subitems Progress=TRUE, Subitems Progress, Dev Progress) 
That formula isn’t working, what should i do? Thanks

posts.author: abdlahaziz (Abdul Aziz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys, I have a formula IF(Subitems Progress=TRUE, Subitems Progress, Dev Progress)

That formula isn’t working, what should i do? Thanks

Testing11430×307 30.1 KB

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml:
abdlahaziz:

IF(Subitems Progress=TRUE, Subitems Progress, Dev Progress)

IF({Subitems Progress},{Subitems Progress}, {Dev Progress})
